details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest certified-organic tomato fertilizer 10-15kg < $50, rating >= 4.0
Task 2: Compare two soil conditioners and buy higher organic matter product
Task 3: Monthly subscription for 15–20kg compost with free shipping under $40
Task 4: Nutrient calculator for 1 acre of lettuce and add recommended nitrogen fertilizer < $70
Task 5: Buy 2 bottles of indoor houseplant fertilizer 1–2L, rating >=4.5, $15–$30
Task 6: From 2023+ transition article, add first recommended garden fertilizer to cart
Task 7: Submit bulk order inquiry for 500 kg of pelletized chicken manure
Task 8: Create 3-product seasonal nutrient plan under $120 (soil amendment, base fertilizer, foliar spray)
Task 9: Order vineyard bundle for grapes < $150 including foliar spray, with specific delivery date
